jcr:content.jcr:title: Students & New Graduates
jcr:content.ctaAltText: Learn more about AbbVie's student programs

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: We are AbbVie, a World’s Best Workplace and biopharmaceutical company laser-focused on making a real difference—for patients, communities, and the world.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: If you’re a student who’s ready to hone your skills, make deep connections, and gain experience while making a difference, then explore our programs and opportunities to make that happen.

block.imageAlt: male and female working in lab
block.name: Custom Image

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: From our EXCEL externships to internships to co-ops, we provide currently enrolled college students with the opportunity to work on big projects and develop into future leaders.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: We empower recent college graduates to innovate in science, business, and leadership while creating opportunities to work on real-world challenges that make a difference globally.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text:
With a presence in over 70 countries and a mission to positively impact more than 60 million lives each year, we create opportunities for students and new graduates to gain real-world experience, mentorship, and grow through innovation-driven programs.

Our inclusive, collaborative, and innovative culture is grounded in the Ways We Work, which guides how we support one another and make a lasting impact. We believe that how we achieve breakthroughs matters just as much as the results, creating a workplace where people and their careers can truly thrive.

With $63 billion invested in research and development since 2013 and partnerships with over 250 institutions, AbbVie offers you the chance to shape a healthier, more hopeful future while building a career with purpose.

block.imageAlt: female and male at a greet and meet
block.name: Custom Image

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Our team hosts a variety of on-campus events throughout the year, from recruitment to professional development. View our calendar to find out more about when AbbVie will be near you!

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: At AbbVie, we bring energy and purpose to every role, from the lab to the field, and we’re playing our part in delivering the best solutions with rigor and speed for those who rely on us.

item_0.name: Accordion Item
item_0.summary: When should I apply for internships, co-ops, or development programs?
item_0.text: Most U.S. roles open in early fall (August to October), with some spring openings. Check our career site regularly for the latest opportunities.

item_1.name: Accordion Item
item_1.summary: Do I need experience to apply for student or new graduate roles?
item_1.text: While experience is not always required for every position, it can be beneficial. We also look for relevant internships, co-ops, volunteer work, or leadership roles in student organizations, as these can demonstrate valuable skills.

item_2.name: Accordion Item
item_2.summary: Are AbbVie programs available outside the U.S.?
item_2.text: Yes, AbbVie offers global programs and country-specific roles, along with some opportunities for international rotations within our development programs. Search by city/town on our careers site.

item_3.name: Accordion Item
item_3.summary: What is the AbbVie interview process like?
item_3.text: You may go through phone or video interviews, with a mix of behavioral, technical, or case-style questions based on the role.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Sign up today to recieve updates on future opportunities.
